title: Add custom Logo / Image to Dashboard
excerpt: I would like to share a Dashboard with a client so that they can access a real time view of the project status. It would be a nice touch to be able to display logos on the dashboard to personalize and add creditability t…

posts.author: mpmcqueen (Matt McQueen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to share a Dashboard with a client so that they can access a real time view of the project status. It would be a nice touch to be able to display logos on the dashboard to personalize and add creditability to the information. I would like my organizations Logo to always (optional) be displayed on the Dashboard and the option to add a client’s logo.

I’m surprised that I cannot find a widget that will allow me to post an image onto the Dashboard.

Thanks!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mpmcqueen - agreed that would be great (seems strange such a thing isnt available yet!). As a workaround, you could use the “Imbed Everything” Widget and point it to the URL of the image. It’s not perfect by any means but may get you by until such a thing is developed.

Thanks
Mark



image697×393 32.7 KB

posts.author: TylerJohnson (Tyler Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on this from the Monday team? Seems like low hanging fruit and something that would make the presentation of a Dashboard much more professional.

posts.author: AntoineHebert (AntoineHebert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Customizing your dashboard with logos is a neat idea for that personal touch. You can use the “Image” widget in some dashboard tools to display your organization’s logo and your client’s logo. Simply upload the image file and adjust the sizing and positioning as needed. It’s a simple way to add that extra flair and credibility to your project status updates.
And if you’re still on the hunt for more ways to customize and simplify the process, here’s a suggestion: consider trying a vector image generator. It can help you create or edit logos with ease.

posts.author: KKlinger (Kyle Klinger)
posts.cookedHtml: I haven’t been able to find an image widget anywhere. Could you share where this could be found? You mentioned ‘some’ dashboard tools. Thanks!

posts.author: Jodi (Jodi Dorfler)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Monday.com! has there been an improvement with adding an image to dashboards? I’m trying to do the same thing as OP and I’m surprised there isn’t a feature to easily add images. An easy fix is to allow images to be pasted in the text widget.

posts.author: humphries.s (Sarah Humphries)
posts.cookedHtml: Really need this to make our dashboards look professional
